meta.title: The Future of North Africa—Reports from Libya, Tunisia, and Morocco
meta.description: Eric Brown, Sarah Feuer, Lee Smith, and Samuel Tadros discuss the prospects for lasting democracy and persistence of extremist sects in North Africa. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
